violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as needed. - Middle filters in need of cleaning. Filters on the ends are fine.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. - Pizza boxes on floor in kitchen. Single use items need to be stored off floor.
Toilet facilities. — --- Shared toilet room upstairs needs to be provided with a tight fitting or self closing door.
Lighting. — --- Lights in kitchen collecting dead bugs. Need to carefully remove shields and clean on a more regular bases.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
